titleStmt.title: SII 26.507: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 507. (A.R. No. 480 of 1909.) MĀṞANĒRI, SATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the ruined Śiva temple.
This inscription is damaged and incomplete.

It records a grant, probably made by the king, of two mā of land, 512 kuḻi in extent at 256 kuḻi a mā by the 16-foot rod, tax-free, to the goddess Muṉivaṟiyāda-nāchchiyār of the holy bed-room in the temple of the god Sundarapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Māṟamaṅgalam in [. .]nīlakkuḍi-nāḍu. It is stated that the gift-land might get water from the big tank of the village.
The signatory was Araiyaṉ Kaliyaṉ alias Kaliṅgattaraivaṉ of Taṭṭaṉūr in Kīḻ-Śembi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . nilakkuṭināṭṭu māṟamaṅkalattu nāyaṉār cuntarapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyilc civabrāhmaṇaṟku Ikkoyilil tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai muṉivaṟiyāta nācciyāṟku
ḷḷiṭṭa nittanimantaṅkaḷukku patineṭṭāvatu mārkaḻi mātamutal Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu māvukku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻellai pullamaṅkalattu Ellai
ce kuḷattu Innāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉa nir nilattukku vaṭakkum melellai naṅkaṇṭuḻavukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai ṉcaiykkarai niccattu
Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattil patiṉāṟaṭikkolāl Irunūṟṟaimpattāṟu kuḻi koṇṭa torumāvāka Iraṇṭumānila miṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākakko
ṇṭu kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Innilattukku Ivvuṟ periyakuḷattil nirpāccivittukkoḷka Ippaṭikku Ivai kiḻcempināṭṭut taṭṭaṉūr Araiyaṉ kaliyaṉāṉa kaliṅkattaraiya
Digital edition of SII 26.507 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
